positive: Minimalist geometric design featuring a stylized, silhouetted forest scene with interlocking polygonal trees and abstract foliage. The composition must be perfectly centered, optimized for apparel print application, using a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep forest green, charcoal grey, and a pop of burnt orange. Strong use of negative space and sharp, clean lines. Aspect ratio 1:1. Vector art quality, perfect symmetry, high contrast print design, flat lay style, modern tribal aesthetic, graphic novel style.
negative: blur, low resolution, noise, text, logo, signature, watermarks, artifacts, messy, poor anatomy, extra limbs, childish, photorealistic, 3d render, gradient, messy lines
